title: Cubed Meat -Netherless Edition
description: Zombies Baby. No nether or End for this one (Vanilla Based)
body:
![Welcome To Cubed Meat ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb22fc5483bce692e74244887175536946f83344_0.webp)

- Awesome New Zombie Ai 
- Distant Horizons Compatible, -Just add a Distant Horizons Compatible Shader if you want shaders
  
- Customizable, just Check The disabled Mods you Want 
- great Preformance
- Use's Essentail Mod For Multiplayer, You can disable it If you dont want it
- It has a Couple Shaders already
- Uses **Tough Beginnings** and the **Reskillable** mod
- has the Chunky Mod try to use that if your computer didn't come from space

**!!!!This Is a work In Progress!!!!**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  ______________________________________________________________________________________________
  
-**This Modpack Doesnt have a Nether or a End**- 

ill be making another pack for that hopefully soon

___________
-**kinda buggy Campfire like**, 

-campfire resting showing Ui when you want to add fuel, 

-sticks giving regular torches when you put sticks on the campfire instead of Lit Torches, 

-when you want to add fuel to the campfire you'll need to add 4 sticks/wood (or anything since it just wants to put it on the campfire before putting it as fuel) before you can add your fuel. 

**ive already asked **The Campfire Resting Mod** creator to add Shift Right Clicking to open the Ui instead and people have asked **Build Your Campfire** to add compatibilty with hardcore torches, im also working out the fuel problem since i think its just a compatibilty issue with **Unlit Campfire Mod***

**if you dont like how often the Campfire Resting is showing up for now you could disable it, sorry*

-Every Mod can be updated Except **Salty´s Realistic Forging**

_*for some reason when i update the mod it switches to the No Tools Version of the mod, if you do update that mod just go to the mod page and revert to the Regular Version (the one that doesnt say no tools)_ 
___________________________________________________________________________________
if You have any bugs/issuse or questions please put it in the issuses tab and ill try to help 
</details>

# a few Links to cool mods that are Used in this pack
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-[DrDestens MCShaders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/drdestens-minecraftshaders/comments)

[TZP Plus Mutants](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tzp-plus-mutant-beasts-re-texture/comments)

[Tissou's Zombie Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tissous-zombie-pack-optifine-1-7x-1-20)

[Tough Beginnings](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tough-beginnings)

[Weaker day zombie](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/weaker-day-zombie/comments)
</details>



**Check out The Dependencies for the other Mods (in the Versions tab and when you click on the Modpack**

### Modders are Amazing people and their Work is what keeps alot of people including me coming back or even buying games i usually wouldnt, Please give them love and good feedback.
